revision.comment: add {{[[Template:CatAutoTOC|CatAutoTOC]]}}, which will generate a table of contents (TOC) if the category has enough pages to need one
1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (7 members)
Text replacement - "(?<!<noinclude>)\{\{\s*[dD]raft categories\|([^}]+)\}\}(?!<\/noinclude>)" to "<noinclude>{{Draft categories|\1}}</noinclude> "
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: tidy cats/interwikis, add JA text & EN link
revision.text:
{{Navseasoncats}} {{Portal|Religion}} {{CatAutoTOC}} <noinclude>{{Draft categories|
}}</noinclude> [[Category:13th-century Buddhists|Nuns]] [[Category:13th-century nuns|Buddhist]] [[Category:Buddhist nuns by century]] [[Category:Categories with 7 members]] [[category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[en:13th-century Buddhist nuns]] [[en:Category:13th-century Buddhist nuns]] [[Category:13th-century Buddhists|Nuns]] [[Category:13th-century nuns|Buddhist]] [[Category:Buddhist nuns by century]] [[Category:Categories with 7 members]] [[category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Navseasoncats}}
{{Portal|Religion}}
{{CatAutoTOC}}
{{Draft categories|

}}
{{wikidata link|Q86304541}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:13th-century Buddhist nuns]]
[[en:Category:13th-century Buddhist nuns]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:13th-century Buddhists|Nuns]]
[[Category:13th-century nuns|Buddhist]]
[[Category:Buddhist nuns by century]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=13th-century_Buddhist_nuns here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
